name: View turn details correctly on the receipt

steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "3328"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('3', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('3', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('2', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
And I click on the queue "HAIR" button
Then I should see the employee "TurnDetail" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
And I select the "GIFT CARD" category
And I add the "Shampoo" service to my cart
And I add the "Gift card $100" service to my cart
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Activate Gift Card $100.00"
And I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the number card "2222" visible
When I click on the "ADD ON" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the service "Gift card $100 (2222)" in my cart
And I should see my cart showing 3 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
And I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Close Ticket"
And I should see a popup dialog with content "CHANGE$0.00OK"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I navigate to "Turn" on the navigation bar
Then I should be redirected to TURN_DETAILS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the text "Technicians" visible
And I should see the text "Hair" visible
When I click on the "Hair" button
And I select the last turn "4.00" for "TurnDetail"
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('tr.MuiTableRow-root').filter({ has: locator('[title="TurnDetail"]') }).locator('td.MuiTableCell-root').filter({ has: locator('p').filter({ hasText: '4.00' }) }).last()
Click locator('tr.MuiTableRow-root').filter({ has: locator('[title="TurnDetail"]') }).locator('td.MuiTableCell-root').filter({ has: locator('p').filter({ hasText: '4.00' }) }).last()
Then I should see the Turn, Regular, Total, Left as "4.00 $95.70 $95.70 $15.70" in turn details
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$255.70"
When I reopen to void ticket with payment amount "$255.70"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$255.70' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$255.70' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$255.70' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'VOID TICKET', exact: true })

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).or(locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'VOID TICKET' }) }))
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'SELECT VOID REASON' }) }).getByText('System Test', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#draggable-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: /confirm void/i }) }).last().getByRole('button', { name: /confirm/i })
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I clock out the timesheet with PIN "3328"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('3', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('3', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('2', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('8', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
